title: BrokerProductLifecyclePosture
description: Broker-owned typed product lifecycle posture surface for attach and status contracts.

product_instance_id.description: Stable repo-scoped product instance identity that excludes host-local runtime paths.

lifecycle_generation.description: Restart identity for this live broker lifecycle generation.

attach_mode.description: Attach mode projected by broker-owned lifecycle posture.

lifecycle_posture.description: Normalized product lifecycle posture for attachable clients.

attachable.description: Whether attach to this broker instance is allowed.

normal_operation_allowed.description: Whether normal managed execution is allowed under current repository substrate posture.

blocked_reason_codes.description: Stable blocked reason code set when normal operation is not allowed.

degraded_reason_codes.description: Stable degraded reason code set when lifecycle posture is degraded.

repository_root.description: Authoritative repository root bound to this product instance.

project_context_identity_digest.description: Validated project-context identity digest when available.
